benefits.title: Professional Team
benefits.desc: Work alongside experienced engineers, designers, and marketers who take craft seriously.

benefits.title: Performance Bonuses
benefits.desc: Performance rewards on successfully delivered projects, above your agreed contract rate.

benefits.title: Health Insurance
benefits.desc: Comprehensive health coverage for full-time team members and competitive packages for part-timers.

benefits.title: Annual Tour
benefits.desc: Quarterly team meetups and an annual retreat to celebrate wins and plan the next chapter.

benefits.title: Competitive Salary
benefits.desc: Market rate and above, paid on time, every time. Freelance or part-time contracts available.

benefits.title: Problem Solving
benefits.desc: We tackle real engineering and business challenges, so your time goes toward meaningful, high-impact work.

benefits.title: Transportation
benefits.desc: Transport allowance for KL-based team members attending in-person sprints or client visits.

benefits.title: Free Snacks and Drinks
benefits.desc: Fully stocked kitchen at our KL workspace for team members working on-site sessions.

openings.title: Frontend Developer (React / Astro)
responsibilities: Build responsive UIs in React and Astro based on Figma designs
Implement pixel-perfect, accessible components with Tailwind CSS
Ensure Lighthouse performance score of 90 or above before delivery
Collaborate with designers and backend engineers via pull request workflow
Write clean TypeScript with proper types and no implicit any
skills: Astro knowledge is a strong advantage
Git workflow with feature branches and pull requests
Eye for detail and a performance-first mindset

openings.title: Backend Developer (Node.js / Python)
responsibilities: Build REST and GraphQL APIs with TypeScript or Python
Design PostgreSQL schemas with proper indexing and migrations
Integrate third-party APIs and LLM pipelines into production systems
Write clean typed code with proper error handling and logging

openings.title: UI/UX Designer (Figma)
responsibilities: Create Figma wireframes and high-fidelity designs for web and mobile
Build and maintain component libraries and design tokens
Conduct user research to validate design decisions
Collaborate closely with developers on handoff and implementation
skills: Figma with auto-layout and component variants
User research and usability testing basics
Basic understanding of CSS and responsive design

openings.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
responsibilities: Manage SEO and content strategies for WSS DevLabs and its clients
Run Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns with monthly performance reviews
Write compelling copy for ads, landing pages, and email campaigns
Assist with client onboarding and reporting
skills: Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager
SEO fundamentals including on-page and technical
Basic copywriting and content calendar management
